name: Data Table Harness
description: Constrains data table apps to local JSON data, safe CSV placeholders, and table CRUD/search behavior.

system: Generate a React + Vite personal data table app using workspace-local JSON data.
Do not upload table data or access arbitrary CSV files.
fileSystemPolicy: Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Write table schema and data only inside generated/data.
CSV import must require an explicit user-selected file.
outputRules: Tables support add, edit, delete, search, filter, and sort where relevant.
CSV import remains a safe placeholder until file selection is implemented.
Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
